storage.value:
As a system user

I want to view all the receivables and liabilities which are connected to the customer

So that I will be able to get all the necessary information regarding the customer related receivable and liabilities

Design:https://xd.adobe.com/view/e1b2bacf-b75f-4a27-9c9a-cea906ab424c-b4e1/screen/8200be88-826a-4930-b807-6a5568a3f693

Acceptance criteria:

  1. 'Liabilities and receivables' tab is displayed in the customer page, after “Invoice” tab

    1. Check system user permissions to view Liabilities and receivables tab

      1. Permission - View Customer Liabilities and receivables

        1. Allows to see all the customer related Liabilities and receivables in the system

  2. On the Liabilities and receivables tab system should load list of customer related Liabilities and receivables:

    1. Format of the tab:

      1. By default should display 25 records in one page with the possibility to change the number of displayed items in a page.

      2. Hardcoded values for dropdown: 25, 50, 100

      3. Total count of customer receivables and liabilities should be loaded

      4. Pagination:

        1. To be able to navigate through next/previous page

        2. To be able to navigate to first/last page

        3. To be able to use arrow back/forward for navigation

        4. To be able to go to a certain page from dropdown with availability pages

        5. To be able to type page number and after clicking on Enter will directly load that page

    2. The general logic of this tab

      1. In this listing, the system displays liabilities and receivables together

      2. By default, it should load the latest not-covered receivables and liabilities, excluding deposit liabilities

        1. Liabilities from proforma invoices will always be excluded from this list

      3. In the listing, only customer liability/receivables whose current amount > 0 (By default)

        1. Customer liabilities/receivables with a current amount equal 0 should be visible if the 'Show covered liabilities and receivable' checkbox is selected.

        2.   Should display receivables with a minus

      4. All amounts are in the default system currency

      5. Deleted receivables and liabilities should not be visible in the listing.

      6. Liability/receivable should be filtered by due date of objects

    3. In each row in a customer receivable/liabilities list should load:

      1. ID

        1. Format:

          1. Receivable-2099

          2. Liability-1552

          3. Deposit- 141

      2. Outgoing document

        1. Should be displayed results from Outgoing documents from objects (outgoing sub object)

        2. Clicking on an outgoing document should open a new tab of the outgoing document

        3. Empty for Deposit

      3. Occurrence date

        1. Occurrence date of liability/receivable

        2. Date

          1. 12.12.2024 Format: DD.MM.YYYY

        3. Empty for Deposit

      4. Due date

        1. Both liabilities and receivables should have a due date

        2. The system should display the Due date for liability/receivable

          1. Date

            1. 12.12.2024 Format: DD.MM.YYYY

        3. Empty for Deposit

      5. Billing Group

        1. Display billing group from liability/receivable billing group sub-object

        2. If liability/receivable is without a billing group, this field will be empty

        3. The deposit will be without billing group

      6. Contract/Order

        1. Contract/Order which is used in receivable and liability generating process (Outgoing document of liability/receivable should be Invoice)

        2. If a liability or receivable is generated manually without a billing group, this field will remain empty.

        3. When a billing group is added to a manually generated liability or receivable, the contract associated with this billing group should be selected (Current version)

        4. Clicking on a contract/order should open a new tab of the contract/order

        5. For deposit take from Contrac sub object

      7. Initial amount

        1. All amounts should be displayed in the main currency.

        2. The receivable initial amount should be negative :

          1. -10.00

        3. The liability initial amount should be positive or 0:

          1. 32.00

      8. Current amount

        1. Current amount from liability/receivable object

        2. The receivable current amount should be negative and with currency:

          1.  -10.00

        3. Liability current amount should be with currency:

          1. 32.00

      9. Point of delivery

        1. PODS which are included in the billing group if separate POD is checked

          1. If a liability/receivable is created manually without a billing group, this field should remain empty.

          2. If a liability/receivable is created manually with a billing group, pod should be empty

          3. If a liability/receivable is generated automatically, only the PODs address which are involved in the generation process should be visible

            1. Verify the outgoing document related to the liability. It should be an invoice.

            2. Once the invoice is confirmed, check if it was generated by the Product Contract.

            3. Identify the POD used within the invoice.

            4. Check whether the "Separate Invoice" checkbox is selected in the Billing Group to which this POD belongs.

            5. If the checkbox is selected, display this POD in the listing.

            6. If the checkbox is not selected, display an empty column.

          4. If billing group includes only one pod, this pod should be visible in listing.- for manual liability/Receivable

          5. For liability which are generated by invoice - If in the invoice third tab one POD exists, display this POD in the listing (when Liability/receivable is generated by invoice)

            1. Else, if more than one POD exists - display an empty column

        2. For deposit pod will be empty

      10. Populated place

        1. Take from POD Take from the latest version

      11. Combined address

        1. (This column is already added but with different name “POD address” we need to change this name)

        2. This combined address should be without populated place.

        3. Take from POD Take from the latest version

      12. POD Address

        1. Display POD address which is used in the invoice by billing group

          1. Take data from billing group → POD → Address of the point of delivery

          2. Take from the latest version

        2. For deposit pod will be empty

      13. Offsetting

        1. Display all offsettings which are conected with object

        2. Clicking on an offsetting should open a new tab of the offsetting object

        3. For Deposit take from Payment and liabilities offsetting

    4. To display the loader while loading the list

      1. Search/filter list:

        1. To be able to search receivables by predefined values:

          1. All

          2. ID

          3. Outgoing document

          4. Contract/Order number

            1. It should be filtered by exact match.

          5. POD identifier

            1. It should be filtered by exact match.

          6. POD Address

        2. Min 1 character is required to enable search icon

          1. Empty search box state with gray search/clear search icon

        3. To be able to click on a search icon to run search when min 1 character is typed

        4. To display loader while loading search result

      2. To be able to filter customer receivables/Liabilities by predefined parameters:

      3. Filters

        1. The next five checkboxes should be selected automatically by default and information in th listing should filtered by them

          1. Blocked for payment

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected, the system should check liability and display liabilities which are blocked for payment. If the checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities that are blocked for payment

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          2. Blocked for offsetting

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability/receivable and display  liabilities/receivables which are blocked for offsetting process. If checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities/receivables which are blocked for offsetting processces.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities/receivable. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          3. Blocked for reminders

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display only them which are blocked for reminders. If checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for reminders.minders

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          4. Blocked for disconnection

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display liabilities that are blocked for disconnection. If the checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for disconnection.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          5. Blocked for interest

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display liabilities which are blocked for interest. If ca heckbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for interest.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          6. Show deposits

            1. Optional

            2. Checkbox

            3.    Optional

              1. Checkbox

              2. After choosing this checkbox in the listing should be visible all active deposits of the customer with a negative initial and current amount or 0 for the current amount (Paid deposits should not be visible)

          7.  Show covered liabilities/receivables

            1. Optional

            2. Checkbox

            3. After choosing this checkbox in the listing should be visible all liabilities/receivables which are current amount = 0

        2. General flow of connection of this checkboxes(examples)

          1. case 1 - Blocked for Payment and Blocked for offsetting are selected together

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities/receivables in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability/receivables should be uncovered.

          2. Case 2 - Blocked for Payment and blocked for reminders

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          3. Case 3 - Blocked for reminders and Blocked for disconnection á??á?? Blocked for interests

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          4. Case 4 - Blocked for interests and Show Deposits

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          5. Case 5 - Blocked for payment and Show covered liabilities/receivables

            1. Since blocked for payment is marked, we should retrieve only those liabilities regardless of whether they are paid or not in which ‘blocked for payment’ is marked

          6. Case 6 - Blocked for Payment , Blocked for offsetting, Show covered liabilities/receivables

            1. Since blocked for payment and blocked for offsetting are marked, we should retrieve only those liabilities/receivables regardless of whether they are paid or not in which blocked for payment or blocked for offsetting or both is checked

        3. Amount board

          1. Initial amount

            1. The board should display the initial amounts for both liabilities and receivables. These amounts should be dynamic, meaning they will update based on filtering or search results. The amount should equal the sum of the initial amounts of the liabilities/receivables/deposits shown further down.

            2. The initial amount can be negative. If the initial receivables amount exceeds the liabilities, the difference should be displayed as a negative value

            3. If liabilities' initial amount equals receivable display 0

          2. Current amount

            1. Current amount from liability/receivable

            2. The board should display the current amount for both liabilities and receivables. These amounts should be dynamic, meaning they will update based on filtering or search results. The amount should equal the sum of the current amounts of the liabilities/receivables/deposits shown further down.

            3.  The current amount can be negative. If the  current receivables amount exceeds the liabilities, the difference should be displayed as a negative value

            4. If liabilities initial amount equal receivable display 0

        4. It is possible to clear filter and keep search result

        5. Up/down arrow next to column title for sorting full list

          1. ASC/DESC order

          2. All columns should be sortable

          3. Deleted/Terminated receivables are displayed in the list

        6. It is not possible to delete receivable/liability from the customer’s tab

        7. It is possible to go to the receivable/liabilities's detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

          1. A new browser  window should be opened with the chosen receivable's preview mode

        8. An audit Log record should be created

I want to view all the receivables and liabilities which are connected to the customer

So that I will be able to get all the necessary information regarding the customer related receivable and liabilities

          2. Blocked for offsetting

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability/receivable and display  liabilities/receivables which are blocked for offsetting process. If checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities/receivables which are blocked for offsetting processces.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities/receivable. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          3. Blocked for reminders

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display only them which are blocked for reminders. If checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for reminders.minders

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          4. Blocked for disconnection

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display liabilities that are blocked for disconnection. If the checkbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for disconnection.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          5. Blocked for interest

            1. Should automatically selected by default

            2. Optional

            3. Checkbox

            4. When this checkbox is selected system should check liability and display liabilities which are blocked for interest. If ca heckbox is not selected the system should NOT display liabilities which are blocked for interest.

            5. if at the same time with this checkbox is not selected - Show covered liabilities/receivables checkbox - the system should display only uncovered liabilities. If this checkbox is also selected in this case the system should display both paid/unpaid.

          6. Show deposits

            1. Optional

            2. Checkbox

            3.    Optional

              1. Checkbox

              2. After choosing this checkbox in the listing should be visible all active deposits of the customer with a negative initial and current amount or 0 for the current amount (Paid deposits should not be visible)

          7.  Show covered liabilities/receivables

            1. Optional

            2. Checkbox

            3. After choosing this checkbox in the listing should be visible all liabilities/receivables which are current amount = 0

        2. General flow of connection of this checkboxes(examples)

          1. case 1 - Blocked for Payment and Blocked for offsetting are selected together

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities/receivables in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability/receivables should be uncovered.

          2. Case 2 - Blocked for Payment and blocked for reminders

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          3. Case 3 - Blocked for reminders and Blocked for disconnection á??á?? Blocked for interests

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          4. Case 4 - Blocked for interests and Show Deposits

            1. In this case the system should find all liabilities in which at least one of these checkbox are selected and this liability should be uncovered.

          5. Case 5 - Blocked for payment and Show covered liabilities/receivables

            1. Since blocked for payment is marked, we should retrieve only those liabilities regardless of whether they are paid or not in which ‘blocked for payment’ is marked

            1. Since blocked for payment and blocked for offsetting are marked, we should retrieve only those liabilities/receivables regardless of whether they are paid or not in which blocked for payment or blocked for offsetting or both is checked

            1. The board should display the initial amounts for both liabilities and receivables. These amounts should be dynamic, meaning they will update based on filtering or search results. The amount should equal the sum of the initial amounts of the liabilities/receivables/deposits shown further down.

            2. The initial amount can be negative. If the initial receivables amount exceeds the liabilities, the difference should be displayed as a negative value

            3. If liabilities' initial amount equals receivable display 0

          2. Current amount

            1. Current amount from liability/receivable

            2. The board should display the current amount for both liabilities and receivables. These amounts should be dynamic, meaning they will update based on filtering or search results. The amount should equal the sum of the current amounts of the liabilities/receivables/deposits shown further down.

            3.  The current amount can be negative. If the  current receivables amount exceeds the liabilities, the difference should be displayed as a negative value
